advancements.unusual_prehistory.breed_ho: Breed a pair of Holocene animals
advancements.unusual_prehistory.obtain_e: Recreate your first prehistoric egg or embryo
advancements.unusual_prehistory.obtain_f: Use a Brush to uncover fossils at a Fossil Site or Tar Pit
advancements.unusual_prehistory.obtain_l: Create a Living Ooze in a cauldron to incubate embryos with
advancements.unusual_prehistory.obtain_m: Find some Machine Parts in a loot chest
advancements.unusual_prehistory.obtain_o: Craft some Organic Ooze to fuel the revival process
advancements.unusual_prehistory.obtain_t: Craft a Transmogrifier, the key component in creature revival
advancements.unusual_prehistory.open_boo: Used to allow entry unlocking in the Paleopedia
advancements.unusual_prehistory.pacify_m: Feed an Enchanted Golden Apple to an aggressive creature to make it permanently neutral
advancements.unusual_prehistory.revive_k: The man on the street will not be able to remember this.
advancements.unusual_prehistory.root.des: Revive creatures from the ancient past!
effect.unusual_prehistory.carnotaurus_fu: Gain increased speed and attack speed as your health gets lower
item.unusual_prehistory.paleopedia.entry: Asphalt forms when tar comes into contact with lava or water. Mobs on asphalt gain increased movement speed.

Using the process of transmogrification, new life may be created from a fossil. $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/miscellaneous/incubation)Incubate$(/l) your newly made egg and let extinct creatures roam the Overworld once more.
Life Finds a Way

One of the first steps in your journey is to find $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/world)Fossil Sites$() underground or on the surface. Fossils can be obtained using a $(highlight)Brush$() on suspicious blocks in these sites.
Fossil Hunting
Finding $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/blocks_items/machine_parts)Machine Parts$() is essential to the revival process.
Ancient Machines
The $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/blocks_items/transmogrifier)Transmogrifier$() is fueled with Organic Ooze. Take care to make more for reviving larger creatures!
Goo is Fuel

Using $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/blocks_items/machine_parts)Machine Parts$(), one can create a $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/blocks_items/transmogrifier)Transmogrifier$() fueled by $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/mobs/organic_ooze)Organic Ooze$().
Transmogrification
Recently extinct mobs have left behind traces—artifacts—of themselves in the world. Use these remains to bring them back once more.
Holocene Artifact
Egg must be placed underwater to hatch.
Aquatic Egg
Egg must be placed underwater to hatch
Embryos must be placed in $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/mobs/living_ooze)Living Ooze$(/l) to gestate.
Embryo
Embryo must be placed in §aLiving Ooze§7to gestate
Egg must be placed down to hatch. $(highlight)Wool$(), $(highlight)Moss$() or $(highlight)Hay Bales$() may be placed under nest eggs to speed up hatching.
Nest Egg
Egg must be placed down to hatch
Egg must be thrown to hatch.
Projectile Egg
Egg must be thrown to hatch
Egg must be placed on-top of water to hatch.
Raft Egg
Egg must be placed on-top of water to hatch
Incubation
Machine Parts can be found within $(highlight)Dungeons$(), $(highlight)Jungle Temples$(), $(highlight)Desert Pyramids$() or $(highlight)Mineshafts$().
Mesozoic Fossil Sites are encased large fossils found underground. They are surrounded by $(highlight)Mesonite$(). Excavating fossils from mesozoic fossil sites yields mesozoic fossils.
Mesozoic Fossil Site

Organic Ooze is used as fuel for the $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/blocks_items/transmogrifier)Transmogrifier$(/l), and also to make $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/mobs/living_ooze)Living Ooze$(/l).
Aggressive mobs may be pacified for a little less than a day by feeding them their favorite foods. An $(highlight)Enchanted Golden Apple$() can be used to pacify mobs permanently.
Pacification
Paleozoic Fossil Sites are encased large fossils found deep underground. They are surrounded by $(highlight)Paleostone$(). Excavating fossils from paleozoic fossil sites yields paleozoic fossils.
Paleozoic Fossil Site
Petrified Trees are structures found underground. They are encased in $(highlight)Floralite$(). Excavating fossils from petrified trees yields plant fossils.
Petrified Tree
Reinforced Glass is blast-resistant and mob-resistant glass, and can be used to protect viewing areas from aggressive mobs.
Tar is found in $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/world/tar_pit)Tar Pits$(/l). All mobs and the player sink in tar, and can suffocate if left under for too long. Tar can be picked up with a bucket.

Tar Pits are found on the surface. They are pools of bubbling $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/blocks_items/tar)Tar$(/l), with a large fossil in their center. Excavating fossils from tar pits yields cenozoic fossils.
Tar Pit

The Transmogrifier is a machine used to transmogrify fossils into living organisms. It is fueled with $(l:unusual_prehistory:features/blocks_items/organic_ooze)Organic Ooze$(/l) and any fossil can be placed within it to begin conversion. Larger mobs require more fuel.
item.unusual_prehistory.paleopedia.landi: This book acts as a guide to the revival process of various ancient plants and animals, along with any notable traits or uses that they may have.
